attacking_style: Attacks on major HC climbs with extended distance remaining (14.8km+), willing to commit to long solo efforts. Gains time on technical descents through aggressive, high-risk riding.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Technical descents where risk-taking provides advantages; sustained climbs requiring time trial-style pacing over 10+ minutes. Thrives when combining climbing with descending skills.
vulnerability: Insufficient data across multiple races, though holding off world-class chasers like Roglic suggests exposure to pure climbers in head-to-head mountain finishes.
key_patterns: Commits to long-range solo attacks requiring sustained power output over 15+ minutes
Utilizes descending aggression as tactical weapon, willing to accept crashes for time gains
Capable of holding significant time gaps against elite pursuers on final climbs
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation shows strong winning form but insufficient data for trajectory assessment
